_comment: Claude Code hooks configuration for git operations. Copy relevant sections to your .claude/settings.json

hook.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push\s+.*--force|git\s+push\s+-f|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-fd"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Destructive git operations (force push, hard reset, clean -fd) are not allowed. Use safer alternatives.\"}"; else echo "{\"decision\": \"allow\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+commit.*--no-verify|git\s+push.*--no-verify"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Skipping git hooks (--no-verify) is not allowed. Fix the underlying issue instead.\"}"; else echo "{\"decision\": \"allow\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git\s+commit"; then echo "{\"notification\": \"Commit created. Remember to verify the commit message follows conventions.\"}"; else echo "{}"; fi'

block_force_push.description: Prevents git push --force and git push -f

output.reason: Destructive git operations (force push, hard reset, clean -fd) are not allowed.
